节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The pointer module provides APIs related to pointer attribute management, such as querying and setting pointer attributes.
Moving as a cone in four directions
Left part of running state with dynamic cursor
Right part of running state with dynamic cursor
Tapping the right-button area of the touchpad.
Tapping the left-button area of the touchpad.
Tapping or pressing the touchpad with two fingers.
Touchpad two fingers tap or right button.
Touchpad two fingers tap or left button.
Defines a custom cursor. The minimum size is subject to the minimum limit of the image. The maximum size is 256 x 256 px.

Horizontal coordinate of the cursor focus. The coordinates are restricted by the size of the custom cursor. The minimum value is 0, and the maximum value is the maximum width of the image. The default value is 0 if the parameter is left empty.

Vertical coordinate of the cursor focus. The coordinates are restricted by the size of the custom cursor. The minimum value is 0, and the maximum value is the maximum height of the image. The default value is 0 if the parameter is left empty.

Whether to adjust the cursor size based on system settings. The value true means to adjust the cursor size based on system settings, and the value false means to use the custom cursor size. The adjustment range is [size of the cursor image, 256 x 256].

Sets the mouse pointer style. This API uses an asynchronous callback to return the result.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the custom cursor style. This API uses a promise to return the result. The cursor may be switched back to the system style in the following cases: application window layout change, hot zone switching, page redirection, moving of the cursor out of the window and then back to the window, or moving of the cursor in different areas of the window. In this case, you need to reset the cursor style. If followSystem in CursorConfig is set to true, the supported adjustment range is [size of the cursor image, 256 x 256].
2. Abnormal pixelMap parameter passed in; 3. Abnormal focusX parameter passed in;
4. Abnormal focusY parameter passed in.
注释信息: @param { CursorConfig } config - Custom cursor configuration, which specifies whether to adjust the cursor size based on system settings.
@returns { Promise<void> } Promise that returns no value.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Abnormal windowId parameter passed in;
@throws { BusinessError } 26500001 - Invalid windowId. Possible causes: The window id does not belong to the current process.

parameters.说明: Window ID.
Pixel map resource.
Custom cursor configuration, which specifies whether to adjust the cursor size based on system settings.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Abnormal windowId parameter passed in;
Invalid windowId. Possible causes: The window id does not belong to the current process.
